title: ModelEngine-Group/nexent
description: Nexent is a zero-code platform for auto-generating production-grade AI agents using Harness Engineering principles — unified tools, skills, memory, and orchestration with built-in constraints, feedback loops, and control planes.

title: ai-boost/awesome-harness-engineering
description: Awesome list for AI agent harness engineering: tools, patterns, evals, memory, MCP, permissions, observability, and orchestration.

title: first-fluke/oh-my-agent
description: Portable, vendor-agnostic agent harness for project-specific skills, workflows, and agent teams aligned with your codebase, conventions, and engineering standards.

title: Picrew/awesome-agent-harness
description: An awesome list of Agent Harness engineering resources, including GitHub projects, tools, benchmarks, and practical guides.

title: AltimateAI/altimate-code
description: Open-source agentic data engineering harness for dbt, SQL, and cloud warehouses. 100+ tools, 10 warehouses, AI-powered.

title: bytedance/deer-flow
description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

title: can1357/oh-my-pi
description: ⌥  AI Coding agent for the terminal — hash-anchored edits, optimized tool harness, LSP, Python, browser, subagents, and more

title: the-open-agent/openagent
description: ⚡️next-generation personal AI assistant powered by LLM, RAG and agent loops, supporting computer-use, browser-use and coding agent, demo: https://demo.openagentai.org

title: agent-sh/agnix
description: The missing linter and lsp for AI coding assistants. Validate CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, SKILL.md, hooks, MCP. Plugin for all major IDEs included, with autofixes.

mcp-proto-okn: Natural-language access to open scientific knowledge graphs through the Model Context Protocol
description: MCP Server Proto-OKN (mcp-proto-okn) is a Python-based Model Context Protocol server that enables AI assistants to discover, inspect, query and integrate scientific knowledge graphs through natural language. The server provides graph routing, schema inspection, SPARQL execution, ontology expansion, multi-graph querying, and transcript generation, lowering the barrier to cross-domain knowledge grap
authors: Peter W. Rose, Benjamin M. Good, Amanda M. Saravia-Butler

title: Indexing the Unreadable: LLM-Native Recursive Construction and Search of Service Taxonomies
description: The era of the Internet of Agents (IoA) is taking shape: LLM agents are expected to fulfill user goals by orchestrating fast-growing populations of Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, Agent-to-Agent (A2A) endpoints, reusable skills, and other LLM-callable services. Yet LLMs face a structural mismatch with this regime: effective context is a scarce resource that does not scale with the number of
authors: Wei Zheng, Yang Yan, Yiyang Shao
